data.title: PIVX Weekly Pulse (Sept 19th, 2025 — Sept 25th, 2025)
data.description:
PIVX Weekly Pulse (Sept 19th, 2025 — Sept 25th, 2025)Want to know what’s happening with PIVX? Our weekly recap brings you key market insights and the most important community updates, all in one place. Market PulseMasternode Count: The sharp change in market conditions appears to have taken a toll on PIVX masternodes. The number of active PIVX Masternodes saw a steep decline this week, falling from 2,011 to 1,849. This decrease comes amidst a significant downturn across the broader crypto market, with many top-tier assets recording double-digit losses
source: https://medium.com/pivx/pivx-weekly-pulse-sept-19th-2025-sept-25th-2025-60fcf5d44e0d?source=rss----430d9242e45e---4

data.title: Mira Foundation: MIRA registration and redemption now online
data.description: Mira Foundation announced that registration and redemption of MIRA tokens are now live. Eligible community members must register and complete verification to claim their tokens. Eligibility for this airdrop will be determined by a snapshot taken at 00:00 UTC on September 22, 2025. Participants for the initial airdrop include early ecosystem users, node delegates (Drops 1 and 2), Kaito Yappers, Kaito ecosystem stakers (qualified $KAITO stakers in Season 1 will receive 0.20% of the token supply), recognized Discord community members, and OKX Quest participants. Registration deadline: October 2, 2025, 11:00 AM (UTC); redemption deadline: October 26, 2025, 12:00 PM (UTC).

data.title: Lido's proposal on LDO repurchase currently has 100% support, with the deadline being September 30th.
data.description: The Snapshot page indicates that Lido has launched a proposal called NEST, a modular system for using stETH to repurchase LDO from the treasury. Voting is currently underway, with 100% support and a deadline of September 30th. The first operational version of this proposal is expected to launch in December 2025, paving the way for future repurchase mechanisms. NEST is a modular extension of STONKS designed to simplify the exchange of stETH for LDO, with LDO automatically sent to the Lido DAO treasury. The proposal only covers the development of NEST; activation requires a separate on-chain vote. If the proposal passes, further research, timelines, and detailed design will be conducted. Core contributors will further discuss the repurchase mechanism.

data.title: Vanguard Prepares to Offer Cryptocurrency ETF Investments on Brokerage Platform
data.description: According to PANews, Vanguard, the world's second-largest asset management company, is preparing to allow its brokerage platform clients to invest in cryptocurrency ETFs. Anonymous sources have revealed that the company is responding to strong client demand for digital assets and the evolving regulatory landscape. While Vanguard does not plan to launch its own products like BlackRock, it is considering enabling brokerage clients to invest in select third-party cryptocurrency ETFs. However, the timeline for this decision and the specific products to be offered remain unclear.

data.title: Aster compensates traders for the XPL perp incident in USDT
data.description:
Aster, the decentralized perpetual futures exchange built on BNB Chain, has completed compensation for users impacted by abnormal price action in its XPL perpetual trading pair. The incident reportedly unfolded on Thursday, which prompted a response from the platform assuring customers that all affected traders would be reimbursed. In a post on X early Friday, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/aster-compensates-traders-for-xpl-incident/

data.title: A newly created wallet deposited 4.22 million USDC into Hyperliquid and shorted BTC and XRP.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Onchain Lens, a newly created wallet deposited $4.22 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened short positions worth more than $155 million, including a 40x leveraged BTC short position and a 20x leveraged XRP short position.

data.title: Korean Crypto Market Loses $24B in Six Months as Trading Volume Collapses – What’s Going on?
data.description:
South Korea's crypto market shed approximately $24 billion in six months with domestic crypto holdings plummeting from KRW 121. 8 trillion to KRW 89. 2 trillion between January and June 2025 according to the Bank of Korea's Financial Stability Report.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/korean-crypto-market-loses-24b-in-six-months-as-trading-volume-collapses-whats-going-on/

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Worth $22 Billion Set to Expire
data.description: According to Foresight News, Watcher.Guru has reported that Bitcoin and Ethereum options valued at $22 billion are set to expire today. This significant expiration event could potentially impact the cryptocurrency market, influencing trading strategies and market dynamics.

data.title: GoPlus Issues Security Alert on Uniswap Phishing Scam
data.description: According to BlockBeats, GoPlus has issued a security alert regarding a phishing scam targeting Uniswap users. The alert highlights that the top search result for Uniswap on Google is a counterfeit phishing website. Attackers are reportedly using Google-sponsored ads and free Google sites domains to impersonate well-known Web3 platforms, luring users to these fraudulent sites to steal cryptocurrency assets.

data.title: Tom Lee: If the Fed cuts interest rates only once this year, the market will remain strong
data.description: Fundstrat co-founder Tom Lee said that while the market is still pricing in two more Fed rate cuts this year, only one wouldn't necessarily be a bearish sign. If the Fed decides to cut just once by the end of 2025, "the market would interpret that positively, as they prefer to see a central bank cut when the economy is strong rather than weak," Lee said. Following Thursday's weaker-than-expected initial jobless claims, market participants have slightly lowered their expectations for the Fed's quarterly rate cuts. Lee added, "We know the Fed has been lagging in easing policy due to estimated housing inflation, but the reality is they should have started cutting rates sooner... So we have to be cautious. When the Fed discusses this estimated effect, it doesn't mean we need to start a new rate hike cycle simply because the data is lagging. I think that's why the market sees things clearly." (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Hana Network (HANA) With 270 HANA Airdrop for Eligible Users
data.description: Binance Alpha announced that it will feature Hana Network (HANA), with trading scheduled to start at 19:00 (UTC+8) on September 26, 2025.Following the featuring, users holding at least 200 Binance Alpha Points can claim a 270 HANA token airdrop on a first-come, first-served basis. The minimum eligibility threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour for the duration of the promotion.The airdrop requires 15 Binance Alpha Points to redeem. Participants must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha Events page, otherwise the allocation will be forfeited.

data.title: Hong Kong's Stablecoin Regulations May Limit Derivatives Trading, Says DBS Bank CEO
data.description: According to PANews, DBS Bank Hong Kong's CEO, Sebastian Paredes, has expressed concerns that Hong Kong's anti-money laundering (AML) and know-your-customer (KYC) regulations for stablecoins could significantly restrict their use in on-chain derivatives trading. Paredes noted that while the bank will monitor these developments, it intends to focus on expanding its stablecoin service capabilities within Hong Kong.

data.title: A suspected Animoca Brands wallet deposited 3,760 ETH, equivalent to approximately $14.75 million, into Binance three hours ago.
data.description: According to monitoring by The Data Nerd, three hours ago, a wallet (possibly belonging to Animoca Brands) deposited 3,760 ETH (approximately $14.75 million) into Binance. Over the past three weeks, this address has deposited a total of 6,600 ETH (approximately $26.93 million) into Binance.
